title: hardcore-pvz
description: Hardcore PVZ Survival: Thirst, First Aid for Site Injuries, Cultivate Plants to Fight High Difficulty Monsters
body:
**_This is a relatively hardcore Plants vs. Zombies mod package._** _Do you think the difficulty of the current Plants vs. Zombies mod is too easy? Are zombies too weak?_ This integrated package allows you to experience the perfect fusion of the original Minecraft hardcore survival and [Plants V.S. Zombies](https://modrinth.com/mod/plants-and-zombies). You can cultivate your own plant army to resist these terrifying and dangerous zombies
- **Hardcore survival mechanism (bidding farewell to the original version of survival without brain regeneration)**!
Your health value is no longer simply deducted, but treated according to different injured areas, such as arms, body, and head. You must use bandages or other injured areas to restore blood to that area.![Real injury system](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2bf44cea02974f3cc36bc758680adc405f780fa_0.webp)
- **Real thirst system**: You have to make your own water storage container, collect water sources by making glass bottles, and burn them in a furnace to create pure water sources.![thirsty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d76f7af2474c6d6ae2ce3c5c7d787cba9f1b2714.png)With the material foundation in the later stage, you can make durable leather water bags，**_I'll tell you in secret, carrion can be burned in a furnace to make leather_**
- **Monster Comprehensive Enhancement**: 
  In addition to enhancing the original monster's AI mechanism, many terrifying creatures have also been added. And zombie equipment will be enhanced along with your equipment. For example, you have already made iron equipment. So at this point, the zombies will also generate these equipment. And every once in a while, blood nights appear. Although the number of zombies generated during a blood night is very small (I know you may not be able to resist the increase in zombies), each zombie has terrifying combat power.
- **Cultivation of Plant Legion**:
So you need to use these plants to resist zombies
Therefore, your survival difficulty is still high without plants. You must find a way to survive and find various plants in various groups. Sunshine is very important and determines the size of your plant army, which is a great thing.
- **The new rendering engine**: _**Vulkan**_. Those familiar with it know that Minecraft now uses the ancient primitive rendering engine **_OpenGL_**, which prevents your device from fully utilizing its capabilities. Adding [vulkan mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) may solve this problem, but [vulkan mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) is still being tested and the official version of Vulkan seems to be available in version 26.2. Therefore, if your device encounters rendering problems while playing, please be sure to check if **_Vulkan_** is the cause of the problem
- **Suitable audience for playing**:
Players who are tired of playing regular original survival, want to play challenging but creative solutions, and enjoy PVZ memes
If you are a player who doesn't want to play easy farming and hates death penalty. So I believe this integration package may not be suitable for you.
**_- Suggest playing multiplayer games_**
- I suggest that this mod pack is best played as a multiplayer game because it includes a first aid mod. When you die, you will not immediately die, but will become knocked down (of course, if you are playing as a single player or want to die directly, you can press and hold the G key to give up), and then you need someone else's rescue by using bandages for machine rescue.
